headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Eversource Energy, Raises Price Target to $75
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $72 to $75.
